title: Education Department’s Final Rule on Financial Aid Locks in Restrictive Graduate Loan Limits
summary_en: ED has finalized regulations implementing the graduate and professional student loan limits enacted in the OBBB, holding firm to a narrow definition of professional degree programs despite critical public comments and bipartisan opposition from Congress.
title_cn: [待翻译] Education Department’s Final Rule on Financial Aid Locks in Restrictive Graduate Loan Limits
